hero.name: Taufan Fatahillah
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer specializing in building fast, modern, and user-friendly web applications with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.

home.subtitle: End-to-end ownership of web products — from first commit to production deploy. Currently based in Jember, Indonesia.
home.philosophyP1: I don't ship demos. I ship products that solve real problems for real businesses.
home.philosophyP2: My work with local businesses in Jember — a bakery and a driving school — taught me that great engineering isn't about the latest framework. It's about understanding what the business needs, making the right technical decisions, and owning the result end to end.
home.philosophyP3: Every project I take on gets the same standard: fast, accessible, search-friendly, and built to last.
home.ctaSubtitle: Open to full-time opportunities and meaningful freelance projects.

about.heading: About
about.subtitle: The short version
about.bio1: I'm {name}, a {title} based in Jember, East Java. I build web products that solve real problems for real businesses.
about.bio2: Most of my work in the past year has been building websites for local businesses in Jember — a halal bakery and a driving school. Not landing page templates. Real production sites that handle real customers, real orders, and real trust.
about.bio3: Before that, I spent time at BuildWithAngga developing production UIs with Next.js, volunteered on web projects with an international team at Kerja IT Jepang, and spent four years freelancing on Android and web apps for diverse clients.
about.bio4: What I care about is building things that work. Fast load times. Clean code. Good SEO. Accessible interfaces. The stuff that actually matters when a real user opens your site on a slow connection in a small town.
about.bio5: I'm currently open to full-time opportunities where I can contribute to products that have real impact.

descriptions: Crafting responsive and performant front-end interfaces
Developed modern user interfaces using Next.js and TailwindCSS
Collaborated with the team to deliver scalable front-end solutions
Contributed to web development projects as a volunteer
Adapted to an international work environment
Developed Android and web applications for various clients
Built end-to-end solutions from design to deployment
